results.compiled_code:
WITH raw_data AS (
    SELECT
        customerid
		, first_name
		, last_name
		, email_address
		, phone_number
		, address
		, city
		, state
		, country
		, continent
		, postal_zip_code
		, gender
    FROM `samples`.`bakehouse`.`sales_customers`
)

SELECT
    customerid
	, first_name
	, last_name
	, email_address
	, phone_number
	, address
	, city
	, state
	, country
	, continent
	, postal_zip_code
	, gender
    , TRUE AS is_current
    , FALSE AS is_deleted
    , TO_TIMESTAMP('19000101000000', 'yyyyMMddHHmmss') AS effective_from
    , TO_TIMESTAMP('29991231235959', 'yyyyMMddHHmmss') AS effective_to
FROM raw_data

WITH raw_data AS (
    SELECT
        city_name
		, country_code
		, latitude
		, longitude
		, date
		, cloud_cover_perc_avg
		, cloud_cover_perc_max
		, cloud_cover_perc_min

		, rain_lwe_rate_avg
		, rain_lwe_rate_max
		, rain_lwe_rate_min
		, rain_lwe_total
		, rain_probability
		, snow_liquid_ratio_accuweather_avg
		, snow_liquid_ratio_accuweather_max
		, snow_liquid_ratio_accuweather_min
		, has_snow
		, snow_avg
		, snow_max
		, snow_min
		, snow_total
		, snow_lwe_rate_avg
		, snow_lwe_rate_max
		, snow_lwe_rate_min
		, snow_lwe_total

		, wind_speed_avg
		, wind_speed_max

)

WITH raw_data AS (
    SELECT
        franchiseid
		, review_date
		, chunked_text

    , TRUE AS is_current
